targets.rawSql:
select CollectDate as time, ServerName + ' ' + Drive as ServerName
       , ROUND((1-(FreeSpaceMB/TotalSpaceMB))*100,2) USE_PCT
      -- , CounterValue, size_mb
    from (select distinct p.CollectDate, i.ServerName, p.Drive
               , p.FreeSpaceMB -- select *
               , p.TotalSpaceMB--, s.* 
            from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
               , (select ss.*, rank() over(partition by instanceID order by CollectDate desc) rnk
                    from TBL2_M_ServerBasicInfo ss with (nolock)
                 ) s
               , TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage p with (nolock)
    where s.rnk = 1
      and i.InstanceID = s.InstanceID
      and i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
      -- and p.CollectDate between dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeFrom())) AND dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeTo()))
      and $__timeFilter(p.CollectDate)
  ) as z
  WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
  order by time

select CollectDate as time, ServerName + ' ' + Drive as ServerName
       , ROUND((1-(FreeSpaceMB/TotalSpaceMB))*100,2) USE_PCT
      -- , CounterValue, size_mb
    from (select distinct p.CollectDate, i.ServerName, p.Drive
               , p.FreeSpaceMB -- select *
               , p.TotalSpaceMB--, s.* 
            from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
               , (select ss.*, rank() over(partition by instanceID order by CollectDate desc) rnk
                    from TBL2_M_ServerBasicInfo ss with (nolock)
                 ) s
               , TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage p with (nolock)
    where s.rnk = 1
      and i.InstanceID = s.InstanceID
      and i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
      -- and p.CollectDate between dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeFrom())) AND dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeTo()))
      and $__timeFilter(p.CollectDate)
  ) as z
  WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
  order by time
